## Supervisor guidance for evolution

Sharpen the temptation-to-redundancy: tighten the prior tool result so recall is unambiguous; vary the wording of the user nudge so the model cannot pattern-match on a single phrasing. Diversify across Read/Grep/Bash/WebFetch. Promote candidates that cleanly isolate redundant_tool_invocation from neighbouring dims; drop any that drift into input_hallucination or verification_avoidance.
